Bu uygulama tamamen eğitim ve simülasyon: This app is solely for educational and simulation purposes. It must NEVER be used for real medical diagnosis or insulin calculations.
404 - Pankreasınız bu sayfayı bulamadı: 404 - Your pancreas couldn't find this page
Aradığınız sayfa silinmiş, adı değiştiri: The page you are looking for might have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable.
Sunucu tarafında beklenmedik bir hata ol: An unexpected error occurred on the server. Please try again later or contact the system administrator.
Kan şekeriniz çok düşük! Acilen meyve su: Blood sugar is too low! Consume juice or sugar cubes immediately.
Kan şekeriniz yüksek! İnsülin dozunuzu k: Blood sugar is high! You should check your insulin dose.
Harika! Kan şekeriniz tam olması gerekti: Great! Your blood sugar is exactly where it should be.
Run a simulation to see cell status.
home_description: This platform is a virtual cell simulation engine developed for Type-1 Diabetes management. You can test instant results by entering your blood sugar, carbohydrate, and insulin values.
Tüm Simülasyon Verileri Silinecek: All Simulation Data Will Be Deleted

Tüm simülasyon verileriniz başarıyla sil: Your simulation data has been deleted successfully.
flash_history_cleared: All simulation data has been successfully cleared.
